content: inventory scope means questions about knives the user owns. Phrases like 'my knives', 'my collection', 'do I own', 'what do I have', or bare ownership questions default to inventory.

catalog scope means the subject is MKC's product line, not the user's possessions. Use catalog when the user says 'MKC has', 'MKC offers', 'MKC makes', 'MKC produces', 'MKC carries', 'does MKC make', 'are available', 'what has MKC made', 'all models', or any phrasing where MKC (not the user) is the subject. inventory scope when the user says 'I have', 'my collection', 'I own', 'I bought'.
